title: Hash Browned Tomatoes
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that combines the sweetness of tomatoes with the crunch of hash browns.
instructions: Grate the hash and set aside.
Chop the tomatoes and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the grated hash, chopped tomatoes, and Uruguayan (if using).
Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and shape into a flat layer.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the hash browns are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
